title: microlicia woodgyeriana
intro: Microlicia woodgyeriana, also known as the Woodgyer's microlicia, is a species of flowering plant in the family Melastomataceae. It is a medicinal plant that has been traditionally used for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it effective in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Microlicia woodgyeriana include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and soothe digestive problems. The plant can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
